点击上传 或 拖拽上传图标文件: Click to upload or drag and drop to upload the icon file
Only .zip files can be uploaded, and .js, .css, and .json must coexist in the zip. .tff, .woff, and .woff2 files are optional; currently only Alibaba iconfont icon files are supported.
确定要删除图标吗？: Are you sure you want to delete the icon?
